name: Toyou Feiji Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Toyou Feiji Electronics Co., Ltd. provides data storage infrastructure solutions in China. The company offers flash memory, autonomous and controllable, cloud computing, enterprise and distributed storage, storage network, and data protection products. It also provides video cloud, active storage, and database acceleration solutions. The company serves finance, transportation, medical, education, and energy industries, as well as government, military, industrial, and research institutes. Toyou Feiji Electronics Co., Ltd. was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
